visuals.reason: Shows a material scale-dependent reliability limitation.
Clarifies that the score is mainly a topographic-circularity composite and that associations are partly mechanical.

visual_omissions: A new editorial priority chart was not created because the priority assessment is qualitative; an exact table is more transparent. Existing Seaborn analytical figures were reused.
superseded_material: Pre-repair decision-report catalogue counts and the former scale multiplier are provenance only and must not be reused as final findings.
key_caveat: This audit prioritizes manuscript changes; it does not establish new impact origins or candidate probabilities.
